/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libcw2_team_14__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libcw2_team_14__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/cw2_team_14__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/cw2_team_14/srv/example__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/bizare/Desktop/cw2_team_14/build/cw2_team_14:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libcw2_team_14__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
